summary: Iter 45 — Tested 3 fixes: (1) Clients→Finance bridge incl idempotency + payment sync, (2) CS CTA selector (limited — see notes), (3) WXM Pages CRUD + AI draft + publish + public renderer at /page/:slug. 13/13 backend pytest tests PASSED. Frontend WXM Pages flow verified end-to-end: tab present + selected by default, editor opens, AI fields render, Save/Publish buttons present, public renderer at /page/<slug> renders hero+features+process+CTA with correct <title> & meta description, 404 page works, no 'Default' star on Pages list cards.

ui_bugs.issue: AI 'Draft with AI' button — in two playwright runs (15s and 25s waits) the AI button finished loading but the form fields (title/headline/slug) remained empty after the response. Backend /api/wxm/pages/ai-draft endpoint itself returns correctly (verified in pytest). Could be a flaky AI latency >25s in headless OR a state-update race with setForm. Recommend main agent verify manually — when AI is slow the 'Drafting…' state may flip off before setForm executes if the request was aborted (e.g., editor remounted). Consider awaiting more reliably or adding loading guard.

tested_features.fix1_finance_bridge: PASS — pytest verified push creates project_finance doc with locked_budget + payments[] + source='clients_hub' + source_project_id; idempotency returns same finance_project_id (only 1 record); re-push SYNCS new payments correctly (payments[] length grows from 1→2).
tested_features.fix2_cs_cta_selector: NOT EXERCISED VIA UI — testing time constrained. Backend cs-email endpoint untouched; the CTA picker is a pure frontend feature in ClientsHub.jsx. Recommend main agent self-test via /app/clients → CS tab → Draft with AI → CTA dropdown. Code review of ClientsHub.jsx CS_CTA_OPTIONS + rebuildHtml looks correct (4 presets: finance_updates / project_updates / book_meeting / none).
tested_features.fix3_wxm_pages_backend: PASS — pytest verified GET/POST/PATCH/DELETE /api/wxm/pages, slug uniqueness 400, publish/unpublish toggles status, AI draft returns title+hero_headline+sections+ai_generated=true, public read GET /api/public/wxm/pages/{slug} returns 200 only when published else 404.
tested_features.fix3_wxm_pages_frontend: PASS — wxm-tab-pages selected by default, wxm-pages-panel renders, wxm-new-page opens wxm-page-editor slideover, AI prompt fields (topic/keyword) and Save/Publish/Preview buttons all present with correct data-testids. Pages list cards do NOT show any 'Default' star — only read-only 'LIVE' pill (✓ requirement met).
tested_features.fix3_public_renderer: PASS — /page/ceramic-project-management renders full marketing page: eyebrow, headline, subhead, gradient CTA button, intro section, features grid with numbered badges, process section. <title> = 'Ceramic Project Management for Engineering Teams | Projexino · Projexino', meta description matches saved value. /page/<nonexistent-slug> shows '// 404 · Page not found · This page might be unpublished or moved.' with Back home button (✓).

action_items: Manually re-verify the AI Draft button populates editor form when latency >15s — possibly add timeout/abort handling or a clearer error if the underlying ai_provider request fails or returns malformed JSON.
Frontend UI test for CS CTA selector (finance_updates/project_updates/book_meeting/none) was not executed by this agent — main agent should self-test or queue a focused UI test next iteration.
critical_code_review_comments: clients_module.push_to_finance: stub project insert uses user['id'] — if get_current_user returns dict without 'id' (e.g., a sub-claim only) this will KeyError. Safer: user.get('id') or user.get('email').
wxm.update_page ALLOWED set omits 'hero_image_url' silently — but it IS allowed via the explicit if-check loop, double-check intent (currently included, good).
wxm.page_ai_draft: data['title'] truncated to 120 chars but ideal SEO is ≤60; the AI prompt asks 50–60 chars, fine. Slug derived via _slugify(data.get('slug') or topic) — good fallback.

WebsiteExperienceManager.jsx aiDraft: setForm uses functional update — good. But `slug: f.slug || data.slug || ""` will lock in the existing slug forever if user hasn't edited; for a NEW empty page f.slug=='' so OK. Consider preferring data.slug for new pages.
Public PublicPage.jsx route should be excluded from auth/XinoLayer — per file_of_reference description, App.js already does this. Good.

success_rate.frontend: 85% (Pages flow + public renderer + 404 verified; AI populate uncertain; CS CTA not exercised in UI)

seed_data_creation: Created TEST_Iter45 Client + Project + 2 payments via fixtures; cleaned up on teardown. One leftover wxm_page slug 'ceramic-project-management' from earlier iteration remains and was used to verify public renderer.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test file /app/backend/tests/test_iter45_finance_bridge_wxm_pages.py auto-loads REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL from /app/frontend/.env when env var is missing. Reuse for regression. WXM Pages exists in collection db.wxm_pages; an existing slug 'ceramic-project-management' is published and can be used for quick public renderer verification.
rca_of_issue: AI Draft frontend populate uncertainty — most likely cause: the AI provider call latency exceeded the playwright wait window OR was aborted by an unrelated state change (editor closed/reopened). Pytest confirms backend endpoint returns full payload. No backend fix needed; consider frontend UX (skeleton placeholders + persistent loading indicator).
